name: Nanomon (Digimon)
description: A Machine Digimon used for nanomedicine. It was originally a Vaccine-type Digimon whose purpose was to restore computers that have crashed, but its neural pathways were destroyed in an attack by a powerful Virus Digimon, causing it to go berserk. It will reconfigure the data in even computers that are in normal working condition to its liking (of course, making a mess out of it), causing them to malfunction. Its specialty is destroying all sorts of data, and as such no matter how formidable a Digimon, the data forming their body can be destroyed by Nanomon with ease. Its Special Move is firing " Plug Bomb " from its fingertips.
